entry.title: Bill 65 (Hawaiʻi County): Postponed → —
entry.content:
INITIATES AN AMENDMENT TO ARTICLES VI AND VII OF THE CHARTER OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAI‘I (2024 EDITION), RELATING TO THE DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS

Creates a Public Works Commission with the authority to hire and fire the Public Works director and other oversight responsibilities related to the Department of Public Works.

Status: Postponed → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-07-08

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 65 (Hawaiʻi County) — Postponed
entry.content:
INITIATES AN AMENDMENT TO ARTICLES VI AND VII OF THE CHARTER OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAI‘I (2024 EDITION), RELATING TO THE DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS

Creates a Public Works Commission with the authority to hire and fire the Public Works director and other oversight responsibilities related to the Department of Public Works.

Latest action: GOEAC: Postponed to the Call of the Chair - 07/08/25

View on the council site
